I found your dental check-up: "Dentist Appointment" on 2024-05-18, 09:00–10:00 at Downtown Dental Clinic (event id: 5). Do you want me to reschedule it? If so, please choose one:

1) Tell me the new date and time you want (give start in YYYY‑MM‑DD HH:MM and optionally an end time — if you omit the end time I’ll keep the same 1‑hour duration).  
2) Tell me a few preferred date/time windows (e.g., “any morning next week” or “May 20 after 2pm”) and I’ll search your calendar and propose up to 3 free slots.  
3) Tell me to move it to the next available appointment at the same clinic and I’ll search for the earliest open slot.
